## Workspace
- **Live state:** `./STATE.md` — read its TL;DR at the start of every session
- **Policies:** `./dlc/policies.md`
- **Changes dir:** `./dlc/changes/` (active) · `./dlc/changes/archive/` (done)
- **Shared docs:** `./docs/` (architecture 01..N)
- **Out-of-workspace references:** none

## acme-api
<!-- one section per repo; the heading id is what you pass to /dlc:ctx -->
- **What:** REST API — Node 22 / Express / Prisma
- **Entry docs (read IN ORDER):**
  1. `acme-api/CLAUDE.md`
  2. `docs/acme-api/STATE.md`
  3. `docs/acme-api/architecture.md`
- **Commands:** dev `npm run dev` (:3000) · build `npm run build`
- **Green:** `npm run lint` → `npm run test` → `npm run build`
- **Dangers:** only DB `acme_dev`; `acme_prod` is FORBIDDEN without separate confirmation. Migrations always need explicit confirmation.

## acme-web
- **What:** SPA — Vite / React / TypeScript
- **Entry docs (read IN ORDER):**
  1. `docs/acme-web/README.md`
- **Commands:** dev `npm run dev` (:5173) · build `npm run build`
- **Green:** `npm run typecheck` → `npm run build`  <!-- ⚠ proposed: the repo has no test script yet -->
- **Dangers:** design tokens come from the design-system package — never hardcode hex values.
